title: York the women's hockey league champs
description: GEORGE NEWS - The York High girls first team...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The York High girls first team won the Eden Women's League for the second consecutive year on Saturday 3 August at York High School. The final match was fiercely contested and culminated in a sudden-death shootout.


> "This back-to-back championship is a significant achievement, especially considering York High is a school team competing against clubs," said Marike Meyer, marketer for York High.


"The York girls have participated in the women's league for several years to gain exposure to high-level hockey, enhancing their competitive edge in school tournaments."

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
